name: transworld-engagement
releaseNote: Research Phase 2d: scheduled-send worker. Scheduling returns to the report Send page (writes a send_jobs row) and gets a Scheduled sends admin area (list, edit, cancel). A dispatch-only Vercel cron worker (/api/cron/process-sends, every 5 min) atomically claims due jobs via claim_due_send_jobs and hands each job's frozen recipient selection to the shared dispatchCampaign with triggeredBy='cron' — it never composes content or resolves recipients itself, and dispatch re-filters to still-active subscribers so a between-schedule-and-fire unsubscribe or bounce is dropped. Unpublishing a report auto-cancels its scheduled sends; the dashboard Scheduled tile is now live. SQL: one idempotent statement pins search_path on claim_due_send_jobs. No new env vars or dependencies. This is the Clement-approved cron carve-out — a human authors, reviews, and schedules each broadcast.
